use_cases: Separating visual sections within layouts and page content
Dividing form fields or form sections for better organization
Creating horizontal or vertical dividers between card components
Adding visual breaks in navigation menus or sidebars
Building composite components that require section separation
ai_summary: A lightweight separator component built on Radix UI primitives for creating horizontal or vertical dividers. Supports three thickness variants (sm, md, lg) and both orientations. Designed as an atomic layout primitive for organizing content sections in SaaS, e-commerce, and general web applications with a clean, flat visual style.
